---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
---

### Problem to solve

A clear description of the problem this feature addresses.

### Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like and how it should work.

### Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional context

Mockups, references, or any other context to help evaluate the proposal.
